title: rubus × spretus
intro: Rubus × spretus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or aubretia, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the aubretia (Eritrichium nanum) species. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its high anthocyanin content, which has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × spretus include its potential to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and certain types of cancer, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve overall well-being. Rubus × spretus can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
